title: erigeron androssovii
intro: Erigeron androssovii, a flowering plant species commonly known as the Androssov's fleabane, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Erigeron androssovii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried flowers and leaves can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
